case_title: NANCY DAM KWOK VS. NASSER ZUHAIR AHMEDJANL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWOK, NANCY DAM AS TO DEFENDANT AHMEDJANL, NASSER ZUHAIR DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-20-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-18-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-05-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-26-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-26-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST NANCY DAM KWOK FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-26-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-11-2002. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-05-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-20-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-05-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-05-2003 CONTINUED TO APR-30-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LAVON GRANGER. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-30-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2003 CONTINUED TO JUL-02-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-02-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-02-2003 CONTINUED TO SEP-03-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). JUL-02-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-03-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
CASE DISMISSED , AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-03-2003 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST NANCY DAM KWOK FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-30-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-15-2003. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff appeared in Propria Persona. The Court ordered the case be dismissed at the request of plaintiff in propria persona. Proceedings reported by Joann Prior. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2003 Continued To Sep-03-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff appeared in propria persona. The order to show cause is re-set for 9/3/2003 at 1:30 pm in Dept. 212. Proceedings reported by Beldon Yee. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-01-2003 Continued To Jul-02-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in pro per is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 7/2/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by Beldon Yee, CSR #2647. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2003 Continued To Apr-30-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. OSC re-set to 4/30/2003 at 1:30pm in dept 212. Proceedings reported by LaVon Granger. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2002 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-05-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2002 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's in pro per is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Patricia Vansteenbuse (212)
